sources.title: Omnichannel inventory visibility context
sources.summary: Retail operators need a clearer inventory visibility workflow across stores, warehouse, and online channels.

evidence_candidates.claim: Store teams lose sales when inventory status is delayed or inconsistent.
evidence_candidates.summary: Fixture evidence for inventory status latency and missed sales risk.

evidence_candidates.claim: A unified operational view can reduce manual coordination between store and warehouse teams.
evidence_candidates.summary: Fixture evidence for operational coordination impact.

global_constraints: Make evidence gaps visible in the review cockpit.
